base_url.description: UserVoice API base URL override for tests or proxies.

api_key.description: UserVoice API bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

start_date.description: Optional RFC3339 lower-bound value sent verbatim as the start_date query param when set; omitted entirely when unset (legacy: uservoice.go:85-87 only calls query.Set when trimmed non-empty). Not a stateful incremental cursor — legacy never persists or advances this value across reads.
